title: gpu allocation records
description: Operator confirmation of the GPU device set a quest's GPU-using stages may use. Per-quest scope (confirm once; re-confirm to change the device set). gpu.confirm sets status='confirmed'; the GPU-use handoff gate over experiment+analysis rounds (records.py _gpu_gate + invariant experiment_requires_gpu_confirmation) refuses to dispatch that work until this exists, and `experiment run` fails closed + injects CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES from it.

devices.description: CUDA device set the quest's GPU-using stages may use; comma list of non-negative integer indices, e.g. '0' or '0,1' (no spaces, no 'all'/'-1'). Becomes CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES for the Experimenter and for `experiment run`.
